1.name: Heat I — The First Chill
1.description: Every question costs +0.25 extra heat for 5 minutes.

2.name: Heat II — Lingering Doubt
2.description: Every question costs +0.5 extra heat for 5 minutes.

3.name: Heat III — Static in the Veins

4.name: Heat IV — The Violet Pressure
4.description: Radar is limited to 250m for 5 minutes.

5.name: Heat V — Full Hex
5.description: Extra photos are blocked for 5 minutes.

overcharged.name: Overcharged — Signal Drain
overcharged.description: Tool use costs time while active. Stacks up to 3×.

veil.name: Veil of Ignorance
veil.description: The map fades to nothing. Navigate by feel alone.

blackout.name: The Blackout
blackout.description: All visual reference vanishes. Only your position remains.

ghost.name: Ghost Walk
ghost.description: Your presence fades from the map. You are here, but invisible.
